title: nicotiana axillaris var. propinqua
intro: Nicotiana axillaris var. propinqua is a variety of the Nicotiana axillaris plant, a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family that is native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits associated with Nicotiana axillaris var. propinqua include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and aiding in the treatment of certain skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it can also be used in topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
